title: Total RNA Extraction from Adherent Mammalian Cancer Cells using the Zymo Quick-RNA Miniprep Kit
author: Boluwatife OLU OLU Afolabi

steps.title: Aspirate the culture medium from the...
steps.instruction: Aspirate the culture medium from the well of the multi-well plate using a vacuum suction system, leaving the adherent cell monolayer intact.

steps.title: Immediately add 500 µL of RNA...
steps.instruction: Immediately add 500 µL of RNA Lysis Buffer directly to the cell monolayer in each well.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 2...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 2 to 10 minutes to ensure complete cell lysis.

steps.title: Mechanically disrupt the cells by scraping...
steps.instruction: Mechanically disrupt the cells by scraping the surface of the well with a 1000 µL micropipette tip. Pipette the lysate up and down several times to homogenize.

steps.title: Transfer the entire volume of the...
steps.instruction: Transfer the entire volume of the lysate from each well into a distinctly labeled RNase-free microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Transfer the homogenized lysate into a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the homogenized lysate into a Zymo-Spin IIICG Column (yellow) pre-seated in a collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds.

steps.title: To the retained flow-through, add an...
steps.instruction: To the retained flow-through, add an equal volume (1:1 ratio) of 100% ethanol. For example, if you have 500 µL of flow-through, add 500 µL of ethanol.

steps.title: Mix thoroughly by pipetting or vortexing
steps.instruction: Mix thoroughly by pipetting or vortexing.

steps.title: Transfer the entire mixture into a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the entire mixture into a Zymo-Spin IICR Column (green) pre-seated in a collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Add 400 µL of RNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of RNA Wash Buffer to the green column.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds and discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Prepare the DNase I digestion master mix
steps.instruction: Prepare the DNase I digestion master mix: In a separate, clean tube, combine 75 µL of DNA Digestion Buffer and 5 µL of DNase I enzyme per sample. Mix gently by flicking the tube.

steps.title: Carefully apply the entire 80 µL...
steps.instruction: Carefully apply the entire 80 µL of the DNase I master mix directly onto the surface of the column matrix.

steps.title: Incubate the column at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Incubate the column at room temperature for 15 minutes to allow for DNA digestion.

steps.title: Following the incubation, add 400 µL...
steps.instruction: Following the incubation, add 400 µL of RNA Prep Buffer to the column.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds. Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 700 µL of RNA Wash Buffer to the column
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL of RNA Wash Buffer to the column.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds. Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add another 400 µL of RNA...
steps.instruction: Add another 400 µL of RNA Wash Buffer to the column.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 minute to facilitate the removal of residual wash buffer.

steps.title: To ensure the column is completely...
steps.instruction: To ensure the column is completely dry, transfer the green column to a new collection tube and centrifuge at top speed (≥13,000 x g) for an additional 15 seconds.

steps.title: Carefully transfer the Zymo-Spin IICR Column...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the Zymo-Spin IICR Column (green) into a new, labeled 1.5 mL RNase/DNase-free microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of DNase/RNase-Free Water...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of DNase/RNase-Free Water directly to the column matrix.

steps.title: Incubate for 1 minute at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 1 minute at room temperature.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 30 seconds to elute the purified RNA.

steps.title: The eluted RNA is now in...
steps.instruction: The eluted RNA is now in the microcentrifuge tube and is ready for quantification and downstream applications.
